title: SG Culture Pass
text:
SG Culture Pass - SupportGoWhere
SG Culture Pass
Share link
$100 credits to offset ticket purchases for eligible cultural offerings in support and celebration of local arts and heritage activities.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$100 SG Culture Pass credits for Singapore Citizens aged 18 and above in 2025
Credits will be valid from 1 September 2025 to 31 December 2028
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible Singapore Citizens will receive $100 worth of credits to offset ticket purchases for supported local arts and heritage activities and programmes.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen as of 31 December 2024 

Aged 18 and above in 2025 (born before 2008)

How to apply?

No application required

The SG Culture Pass will be available from 1 September 2025 on sgculturepass.gov.sg

Steps to take:
1. Set up your profile - Visit sgculturepass.gov.sg and log in with Singpass to do a simple one-time profile setup.
2. Explore Events - Explore and choose an event, select your preferred date, time, and seats.
3. Pay using your SG Culture Pass credits - Under 'Payment', select 'SG Culture Pass' to use it for your purchase. If you do not have enough credits, top up using credit card or PayNow.

 

Where can I find help?

View more details

SG Culture Pass Help Centre: 6338 3632

Monday to Thursday: 8.30am – 6pm
Friday: 8.30am – 5.30pm
Saturday, Sunday and Public Holiday: Closed

Submit an enquiry
